commands.repair_reason: External PR needs contributor proof plus maintainer review to split or drop unrelated health changes; this is not a safe repair-lane candidate.; Needs attention: The context-engine plumbing is not security-sensitive, but the bundled health change exposes raw bootstrap error text in normal health output.; Review finding: [P2] Gate raw pricing errors behind sensitive health — src/commands/health.ts:516 (sha=a23d49bc0e24ad8e4554601acfded9fe9a87322c)
commands.review_summary:
The branch wires a context-engine loop-hook checkpoint into final `afterTurn` finalization and also adds model-pricing bootstrap errors to health output.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main advances a loop-local `lastSeenLength` but finalizes with the original `prePromptMessageCount`, so an `ownsCompaction` engine that persists turn deltas can receive overlapping ranges. I did not run a live multi-tool harness in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: External PR needs contributor proof plus maintainer review to split or drop unrelated health changes; this is not a safe repair-lane candidate.
